channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rubbish in street attracting more rubbish, 8th May
item.description:
Bag of rubbish in hackney council bag on corner of street, people leaving more rubbish with it

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brougham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass Needs Cutting, 8th May
item.description:
The grass in this hard-to-access corner is 2ft high in places.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Undergrowth Needs Strimming, 8th May
item.description:
Thick undergrowth at the Anerley Road end of the canal needs it's annual strim before it becomes impenetrable. It's a raised bank, but not as tricky to access as it first appears.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road work barriers, 8th May
item.description:
Road work barriers still lying on road one month after work comp,ted
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheriton Avenue, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin bags left on pavement, 8th May
item.description:
Some people Have left bin bags overflowing in their wheelie bins on the side of the road since Monday, despite it not being bin collection week.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Colomb Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 8th May
item.description:
...

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Osbaldeston Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: OIL SPILLAGE O/S No 1 & No3, 8th May
item.description:
Resident reporting the crew for the green refuse bin when emptying the bins into vehicle have caused a oil spillage on the pavement & road, they have covered this with something in green however this has not cleaned it up there is more oil along the road Please could someone look into this as soon the children will be out from School and will end up playing in this if it is not cleaned up
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woodside Close, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree over hanging into my garden, 8th May
item.description:
Please can someone help in any way as the tree is overhanging into my garden

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Okemore Gardens, St Mary Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree need cutting back outside no 3., 8th May
item.description:
Tree need cutting back outside no 3.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Merewood Road, Barnehurst, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Uneven drain surroundings causing loud bangs when vehicles pass over them especially at 3.00 in the morning (milk vans and other delivery lorries), 8th May
item.description:
The two drains surrounds are disintegrating causing the drain to be uneven and making loud banging noises when vehicles pass over them. Many thanks if you can fix these problems.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ladywood Avenue, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tyres dumped on pavement, 8th May
item.description:
Causing an obstruction on pavement for pedestrians

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thicket Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Too many assholes, 8th May
Grass verges in Mountview Road (lower part)now need cutting urgently: around 18 inches high!, 8th May
item.description:
As above
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mountview Road, Goddington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed car, 8th May
item.description:
Untaxed car
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Wotton Green, St Mary Cray, Orpington, Greater London

item.title: Pile of animal waste, 8th May
item.description:
Massive pile of animal waste, potentially from a horse?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Wotton Green, St Mary Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Littered Streets, 8th May
item.description:
Gloucester Road has been littered with rubbish all week. This includes bottles, cans, other recycled products, nappies and food waste.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gloucester Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter pick between Kennington LU and Kennington Park, 8th May
item.description:
Lots of litter on this stretch off the main road - Southwark side

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 126, Kennington Park Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging trees blocking the road and public pathways, 8th May
item.description:
It has been a problem for over a year and now with renewed growth it’s a health and safety issue and causing damage to cars.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Maple Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Right next to post box and opposite Brampton primary school, 8th May
item.description:
Dead fox has been there since AM

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albury Avenue, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 8th May
item.description:
Pothole causing cars to hit each other when turning onto Chipperflied Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mickleham Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
